title: Governor’s Statement: June 05, 2026
description: Good morning and Namaskar. Over the past few months, the global economy has been shaped by heightened uncertainty, disruptions to key trade routes and supply chains, increased market volatility, and cautious business sentiment. 2. Let me at the outset emphasise that the Indian economy entered this episode of global turbulence with much better fundamentals than in previous similar episodes. While we remain confident to withstand these shocks with minimum pain, it is important to not only confront
